/* ---- Types ---- */export class BlackjackStateParser{constructor(){this._data=null;}flush(){this._data=null;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;try{const state=wrapper.readString();// 1
const dealerReveal=wrapper.readBoolean();// 2
const dealerCount=wrapper.readInt();// 3
const dealerCards=[];for(let i=0;i<dealerCount;i++)dealerCards.push(wrapper.readString());const dealerTotal=wrapper.readInt();// 4
const playerCount=wrapper.readInt();// 5
const playerHand=[];for(let i=0;i<playerCount;i++)playerHand.push(wrapper.readString());const playerTotal=wrapper.readInt();// 6
const playerTurn=wrapper.readBoolean();// 7
const canDouble=wrapper.readBoolean();// 8
const canSplit=wrapper.readBoolean();// 9
const insuranceOffered=wrapper.readBoolean();// 10
const bet=wrapper.readInt();// 11
const msgCount=wrapper.readInt();// 12
const messages=[];for(let i=0;i<msgCount;i++){const text=wrapper.readString();const level=wrapper.readString();messages.push({text,level});}const isDealer=wrapper.readBoolean();// 13 NEW
this._data={state,dealerReveal,dealerCards,dealerTotal,playerHand,playerTotal,playerTurn,canDouble,canSplit,insuranceOffered,bet,messages,isDealer};return true;}catch(err){console.error('[BlackjackStateParser] failed:',err);this._data=null;return false;}}get data(){return this._data;}}
